nasb.text: Afterwards they prepared for themselves and for the priests, because the priests, the sons of Aaron, were offering the burnt offerings and the fat until night; therefore the Levites prepared for themselves and for the priests, the sons of Aaron.

esv.text: And afterward they prepared for themselves and for the priests, because the priests, the sons of Aaron, were offering the burnt offerings and the fat parts until night; so the Levites prepared for themselves and for the priests, the sons of Aaron.

cnv.text: 然後他們才為自己和祭司預備祭物，因為作祭司的亞倫的子孫忙於獻上燔祭和脂肪，直到晚上，利未人才為自己和祭司亞倫的子孫預備祭物。

ccb.text: 之后，利未人为自己和祭司预备祭物，因为做祭司的亚伦子孙要继续献燔祭和脂肪一直到晚上。
